% HH have access to safe cooking facilit.% HH have access to safe cooking facilit: Type: String; Meaning: The percentage of households with access to safe cooking facilities (e.g., <25%, >75%).

% HH have private living area.% HH have private living area: Type: String; Meaning: The percentage of households with a private living area (e.g., <25%, >75%).

% HH have mosquito nets.% HH have mosquito nets: Type: String; Meaning: The percentage of households with mosquito nets (e.g., <25%, >75%).

Most needed NFI.Most needed NFI: Type: String; Meaning: The most needed non-food item (NFI) at the site (e.g., Blankets/Mats, kitchen sets).

Location of site main water source.Location of site main water source: Type: String; Meaning: The location of the main water source for the site (e.g., on-site (<10 minutes), off-site (>10 minutes)).

Main drinking water source.Main drinking water source: Type: String; Meaning: The primary source of drinking water at the site (e.g., hand pumps, piped water supply).

Avg amount of water available /day/perso.Avg amount of water available /day/perso: Type: String; Meaning: The average amount of water available per person per day (e.g., 5-10ltr, >15ltr).

Is drinking water potable.Is drinking water potable: Type: Boolean; Meaning: Indicates if the drinking water is potable (yes/no).

Complaints about drinking water quality.Complaints about drinking water quality: Type: Boolean; Meaning: Indicates if there are complaints about the quality of drinking water (yes/no).

Condition of most of the toilets.Condition of most of the toilets: Type: String; Meaning: The condition of the majority of toilets at the site (e.g., good (hygienic), not so good (not hygienic)).

# of functioning toilets.# of functioning toilets: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of functioning toilets at the site.

Main garbage disposal.Main garbage disposal: Type: String; Meaning: The primary method of garbage disposal at the site (e.g., burning, garbage pit).

Garbage and solid waste problem.Garbage and solid waste problem: Type: Boolean; Meaning: Indicates if there is a problem with garbage and solid waste (yes/no).

Availability of hand-washing station.Availability of hand-washing station: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether a hand-washing station is available and if it has soap and water.

Hygiene promotion campaign.Hygiene promotion campaign: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether there is a hygiene promotion campaign in place.

Evidence of open defecation.Evidence of open defecation: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether there is evidence of open defecation in the area.

Access to food.Access to food: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether food is available and if it is sourced on or off-site.

Access to market near from the site.Access to market near from the site: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether there is a market nearby that can be accessed.

Frequency of food distribution.Frequency of food distribution: Type: String; Meaning: Describes how often food is distributed to the community.

Most common source for obtaining food.Most common source for obtaining food: Type: String; Meaning: Identifies the most common method by which the community obtains food.

Screening for malnutrition.Screening for malnutrition: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether screening for malnutrition is conducted.

Most health problem.Most health problem: Type: String; Meaning: Identifies the most prevalent health issue in the community.

Regular access to medicine.Regular access to medicine: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether the community has regular access to medicine.

Access to health facility.Access to health facility: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether there is access to a health facility.

Location of health facilities.Location of health facilities: Type: String; Meaning: Describes the location of health facilities relative to the site.

Main provider of health facilities.Main provider of health facilities: Type: String; Meaning: Identifies the main organization providing health facilities.

Access to education services.Access to education services: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether education services are available.

Location of education facilities.Location of education facilities: Type: String; Meaning: Describes the location of education facilities relative to the site.

% of children attending school.% of children attending school: Type: String; Meaning: Provides the percentage range of children attending school.

Occupation of majority of IDPs.Occupation of majority of IDPs: Type: String; Meaning: Identifies the primary occupation of the majority of internally displaced persons (IDPs).

# of HH with source of income.# of HH with source of income: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of households with a source of income.

Access to income generating activities.Access to income generating activities: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether there is access to income-generating activities.

Livestock on site.Livestock on site: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether livestock is present on the site.

IDPs have access to land for cultivation.IDPs have access to land for cultivation: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether IDPs have access to land for farming.

Most trusted source of Info.Most trusted source of Info: Type: String; Meaning: Identifies the most trusted source of information within the community.

Main topic community is requesting info.Main topic community is requesting info: Type: String; Meaning: Describes the main topic the community is seeking information about.

Serious problem due to lack information.Serious problem due to lack information: Type: String; Meaning: Indicates whether lack of information is considered a serious problem.

ORGANIZATION.ORGANIZATION: Type: String; Meaning: The organization or agency responsible for the activity.

PARTNER.PARTNER: Type: String; Meaning: Partner organizations or agencies involved in the activity.

CLUSTER.CLUSTER: Type: String; Meaning: The main cluster or sector of the activity (e.g., WASH, Shelter, Protection).

SUB-CLUSTER.SUB-CLUSTER: Type: String; Meaning: Sub-cluster or sub-sector of the activity (e.g., Health, Gender, NFI).

REGION.REGION: Type: String; Meaning: The region where the activity took place (e.g., Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (ARMM), Region X (Northern Mindanao)).

PROVINCE.PROVINCE: Type: String; Meaning: The province within the region where the activity took place (e.g., Lanao del Sur, Lanao del Norte).

CITY/ MUNICIPALITY.CITY/ MUNICIPALITY: Type: String; Meaning: The city or municipality within the province where the activity took place (e.g., Saguiaran, Malabang, Iligan City).

BARANGAY.BARANGAY: Type: String; Meaning: The barangay (village) within the city/municipality where the activity took place (e.g., Banday, East Poblacion, Pacalundo).

EVACUATION SITE.EVACUATION SITE: Type: String; Meaning: The specific evacuation site or location within the barangay where the activity took place (e.g., Civic Auditorium, Buru-un Gym, Home-based).

ACTIVITY.ACTIVITY: Type: String; Meaning: The description of the activity or intervention carried out (e.g., Ensuring clean water, Initial Response, Distribution of hygiene kits).

FINISH.FINISH: Type: String; Meaning: The finish date of the activity (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS or Month DD, YYYY).

Remarks.Remarks: Type: String; Meaning: Additional remarks or notes about the activity (e.g., number of participants, specific details).

Region Code.Region Code: Type: String; Meaning: The code representing the region (e.g., PH150000000 for ARMM, PH100000000 for Region X).

Province Code.Province Code: Type: String; Meaning: The code representing the province (e.g., PH153600000 for Lanao del Sur, PH103500000 for Lanao del Norte).

Mun_City_Code.Mun_City_Code: Type: String; Meaning: The code representing the city or municipality (e.g., PH153625000 for Saguiaran, PH103502000 for Baloi).
